title: Opening for Store Manager at McDonald's India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at McDonald's India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, McDonald's India Digital Technologies in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About McDonald's India Digital Technologies:
McDonald's India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with McDonald's India Digital Technologies!
